title: Creamy Yeasty Turkish Lamb Iskender
description: A traditional Turkish dish featuring lamb, sun-dried tomatoes, and a creamy yeasty sauce, wrapped in ti leaves for a nostalgic and diabetic-friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the lamb strips, yeast, and a pinch of salt, and knead for 5 minutes.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and cook the lamb mixture for 5 minutes.
Add the chopped sun-dried tomatoes, garlic, and a pinch of salt to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the cream and a pinch of salt.
Add the cream mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
Simmer the mixture over low heat for 10 minutes or until the sauce has thickened.
Wrap the mixture in ti leaves and serve immediately.
